'''lapala''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:nickelphosphide|nickelphosphide]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| l-p-l
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:nickelphosphide|nickelphosphide]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| lapala
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:læpælæth|læpælæth]] || [[word:læpælæj|læpælæj]] || [[word:læpælæsh|læpælæsh]] || [[word:læpælæ|læpælæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:lapapalath|lapapalath]] || [[word:lapapalaj|lapapalaj]] || [[word:lapapalash|lapapalash]] || [[word:lapapala|lapapala]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:lapalath|lapalath]] || [[word:lapalaj|lapalaj]] || [[word:lapalash|lapalash]] || [[word:lapala|lapala]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:lapaflath|lapaflath]] || [[word:lapaflaj|lapaflaj]] || [[word:lapaflash|lapaflash]] || [[word:lapaflaf|lapaflaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:lapalatha|lapalatha]] || [[word:lapalaja|lapalaja]] || [[word:lapalasha|lapalasha]] || [[word:lapalaka|lapalaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:lapalath|lapalath]] || [[word:lapalaj|lapalaj]] || [[word:lapalash|lapalash]] || [[word:lapala|lapala]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:lapalathal|lapalathal]] || [[word:lapalajal|lapalajal]] || [[word:lapalashal|lapalashal]] || [[word:lapalakal|lapalakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:lapalathatha|lapalathatha]] || [[word:lapalajaja|lapalajaja]] || [[word:lapalashasha|lapalashasha]] || [[word:lapalaka|lapalaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:lapalathan|lapalathan]] || [[word:lapalajan|lapalajan]] || [[word:lapalashan|lapalashan]] || [[word:lapalakan|lapalakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:lapalathaoro|lapalathaoro]] || [[word:lapalajaoro|lapalajaoro]] || [[word:lapalashaoro|lapalashaoro]] || [[word:lapalakaoro|lapalakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|5db7a01}}
